PCMag.com
The
features
you need. All in one place.
Invoicing
Create professional invoices in minutes. Automatically add tracked time and expenses, calculate taxes, and customize your payment options.
Learn about Invoicing
Billing and Payments
Make getting paid the easy part: Get paid faster with automated invoices and billing, secure online payments, and built-in reminders so cash flow stays predictable, all without the chase.
Learn about Billing and Payments
Expenses
Keep track of your expenses with mobile receipt scanning, bank account imports, and automated expense categorization.
Learn about Expenses
Payroll
The simplest way to pay yourself and your team. Seamlessly run payroll, track expenses, and calculate taxes without juggling separate tools.
Learn about Payroll

Solopreneurs
Keep your books in check, your clients happy, and your work on track. Invest in accounting software that respects your time so you can spend it on building your business, not crunching numbers.
Learn More
Businesses with employees
Save time (and money!) by using FreshBooks to collaborate with your team while handling accounting, billing, and payroll.
Learn More

Stay organized and informed about your daily operations, and keep everyone you work with on the same page.

Don't take our word

4.5 Outstanding
FreshBooks offers a well-rounded, intuitive, and attractive double-entry accounting experience. It anticipates the needs of freelancers and small businesses well—better than competitors in this class.
4.5 Excellent
FreshBooks automates daily accounting activities namely invoice creation, payment acceptance, expenses tracking, billable time tracking, and financial reporting.
4.5 Excellent
FreshBooks is an online accounting and invoicing service that saves you time and makes you look professional – Fortune 500 professional.
4.7 Excellent
FreshBooks makes it easy to stay organized, keep track of payments owed and expenses made, send invoices and accept payments.
Award winning support
Our support staff is with you every step of the way, starting the moment you make the switch from spreadsheets or any other accounting software.
100% safe and secure
FreshBooks protects your personal info and your client’s info with industry-standard SSL and encryption so everything is always safe and secure.
Satisfaction guarantee
Buy a plan or sign up for a free trial. FreshBooks promises that if you aren’t satisfied you can contact us anytime within the first 30 days after your purchase for a full refund.
Frequently Asked Questions
How does the 30-day free trial work?
What happens after my free trial?
Do I need to install any software?
Is my data safe?
What if I need help getting started?
How do client limits work in FreshBooks pricing?
Is FreshBooks just an accounting solution or will it help me fill out my tax return?
If I connected my bank account to FreshBooks, how do I know my data’s safe?
What’s is double-entry accounting?
How much does FreshBooks charge per transaction?
What are FreshBooks’ specialized features?
Can FreshBooks replace QuickBooks Online or Xero?

Contact Us

FreshBooks Support
👋 How Can We Help?
Top Categories
Changes and Updates
Find out what's new and improved in FreshBooks.
What Clients View
For clients - learn how to pay invoices with online payments, how to save invoices, estimates, and more.
Dashboard, Account, and Settings
Get started here, or review billing, compliances, and account settings.
Invoices
Make invoices, recurring templates and retainers. Add a deposit, payment schedule, and more.
Payments
Accept online payments from your clients using FreshBooks Payments, PayPal, or Stripe. Track other income, create Checkout Links, and more.
Expenses and Bank Connections
Log expenses and import expenses from your bank account automatically.
Projects and Time Tracking
Track time and Project Profitability, as well as collaborate with your team on projects.
Reports and Accounting
Monitor your business’ health and organize your finances with bank reconciliation.
More Categories

analysis.name: FreshBooks
analysis.tagline: Small business software that makes the hard part easy
analysis.value_proposition: All-in-one invoicing, accounting, expenses, and payroll software built for small business owners and freelancers to save time and get paid faster.
analysis.ideal_customer: Freelancers, solopreneurs, and small businesses with employees or contractors who need invoicing, accounting, and payments in a single tool without an accountant on staff

features.name: invoicing
features.description: Create professional invoices with auto-populated time, expenses, and taxes
features.evidence_quote: Create professional invoices in minutes. Automatically add tracked time and expenses, calculate taxes

features.name: customized invoices
features.description: Unlimited invoices with custom branding and layout options

features.name: recurring invoices
features.description: Automated recurring invoice generation on a scheduled cadence

features.name: estimates
features.description: Create and send unlimited estimates to prospective clients

features.name: proposals
features.description: Create and send unlimited project proposals to win client business

features.name: client retainers
features.description: Set up and bill ongoing client retainer arrangements

features.name: e-signatures
features.description: Collect legally binding electronic signatures on estimates and proposals

features.name: deposit acceptance
features.description: Request and collect partial upfront deposits on invoices

features.name: scheduled late fees
features.description: Automatically apply late fees to overdue invoices on a set schedule

features.name: automated late payment reminders
features.description: Automatically send overdue invoice reminders to clients

features.name: payment schedule
features.description: Set milestone-based or scheduled payment plans on invoices
features.evidence_quote: Add a deposit, payment schedule, and more

features.name: online card payments
features.description: Accept credit and debit cards and digital wallets (Apple Pay, Google Pay) online
features.evidence_quote: Online Card and Digital Wallet Payments

features.name: ach bank transfer
features.description: Accept online bank-to-bank ACH payments from clients

features.name: buy now pay later
features.description: Offer clients installment payment options via Affirm and Afterpay
features.evidence_quote: Buy Now Pay Later with Affirm / Buy Now, Pay Later with Afterpay

features.name: checkout links
features.description: Shareable payment links to collect payment without a formal invoice
features.evidence_quote: Checkout Links Get You Paid Without Invoicing

features.name: in-person credit card payments
features.description: Securely charge cards in person or over the phone
features.evidence_quote: Securely Accept Credit Card Payments in Person or Over the Phone

features.name: secure card storage
features.description: Store client credit cards on file and charge them directly
features.evidence_quote: Clients Can Store Credit Card Info / Secure Card Storage / Charge Client Credit Cards

features.name: instant payouts
features.description: Access funds from completed payments immediately rather than waiting for settlement

features.name: lower credit card transaction fees
features.description: Reduced processing rates and capped ACH fees for high-volume billing
features.evidence_quote: Access lower credit card transaction fees and capped bank transfer (ACH) fees

features.name: expense tracking
features.description: Log and categorize unlimited business expenses in real time
features.evidence_quote: Keep track of your expenses with mobile receipt scanning, bank account imports, and automated expense categorization

features.name: expense receipt scanning
features.description: Scan expense receipts with mobile camera for automatic data extraction
features.evidence_quote: Expense receipt scanning / Automatic Expense Receipt Data Capture

features.name: email receipt capture
features.description: Forward email receipts directly to FreshBooks for automatic logging
features.evidence_quote: Email Receipts Right to Your Account

features.name: bill receipt scanning
features.description: Scan vendor bills with automatic line-item extraction
features.evidence_quote: Bill receipt scanning with the ability to add line items / Automatic Bill Receipt Data Capture

features.name: automated bank import
features.description: Automatically import and categorize transactions from connected bank accounts

features.name: accounts payable
features.description: Track money owed to vendors and manage outstanding bills

features.name: time tracking
features.description: Track unlimited billable and non-billable time across clients and projects

features.name: mileage tracking
features.description: Track business mileage from a mobile device for expense and tax purposes

features.name: project management
features.description: Manage client projects with budget tracking and team collaboration
features.evidence_quote: Manage Budget and Billing for Projects

features.name: project profitability
features.description: Report on revenue vs. costs to assess profitability per project

features.name: double-entry accounting
features.description: Full double-entry accounting reports for GAAP-compliant bookkeeping

features.name: bank reconciliation
features.description: Match imported bank transactions against FreshBooks records

features.name: tax-time reports
features.description: Generate tax-preparation reports (P&L, expenses by category, etc.)

features.name: financial and accounting reports
features.description: Business health and performance reports beyond basic tax summaries

features.name: performance dashboards
features.description: At-a-glance visual dashboards for real-time business metrics

features.name: client profiles and account statements
features.description: Store client contact info and view complete account transaction history

features.name: client portal
features.description: Client-facing portal to view invoices, estimates, and account statements

features.name: client credits
features.description: Apply credit balances to client accounts for use against future invoices

features.name: automated client emails
features.description: Send automated client communications with dynamic field personalization
features.evidence_quote: Automated Client Emails with Dynamic Fields

features.name: custom email templates
features.description: Customize invoice and client-facing email templates with branding

features.name: white-label emails
features.description: Remove FreshBooks branding from all client-facing emails
features.evidence_quote: Remove FreshBooks Branding from Client Emails

features.name: accountant access
features.description: Grant your accountant read/write access to your FreshBooks account

features.name: team members
features.description: Add additional team member seats for collaboration on time, projects, and expenses

features.name: payroll
features.description: Run payroll, calculate taxes, and pay employees and contractors (add-on)
features.evidence_quote: The simplest way to pay yourself and your team. Seamlessly run payroll, track expenses, and calculate taxes

features.name: advanced payments
features.description: Enhanced payment capabilities including lower rates and card-on-file charging (add-on)

features.name: easy switch data migration
features.description: Guided tool to import data from previous accounting software
features.evidence_quote: Simplify your data migration with Easy Switch

features.name: dedicated phone support
features.description: Direct phone support line reserved for Select-tier customers
features.evidence_quote: Gain access to dedicated phone support

features.name: custom onboarding
features.description: Personalized onboarding services for enterprise-tier customers

features.name: mobile app
features.description: iOS and Android apps for invoicing, expenses, mileage, and time tracking on the go

features.name: app store / integrations marketplace
features.description: 100+ third-party app integrations discoverable via the FreshBooks AppStore
features.evidence_quote: Easily integrate your FreshBooks account with over 100 partners

features.name: api access
features.description: Public REST API for developers to build custom integrations
features.evidence_quote: Check out the FreshBooks API to see what's possible or to create integration

features.name: bookkeeping
features.description: Full bookkeeping including categorization, reconciliation, and double-entry records

features.name: high volume billing
features.description: Dedicated tier and support for businesses with very high invoice volumes

differentiators: Award-winning in-house customer support rated 4.8/5.0 across 120,000+ reviews — support never transfers you to other departments
Save up to 553 hours per year and $7,000 in billable hours annually
All-in-one: invoicing, accounting, payroll, and payments without switching tools

praised: FreshBooks has really helped me to be more efficient throughout the year so that tax time…it's less stressful — Damona Hoffman, Dear Mrs D, Inc.
4.8/5.0 support team approval rating across 120,000+ reviews

tiers.name: Lite
tiers.headline_inclusions: 5 billable clients; invoicing, estimates, expenses, ACH/card/digital wallet/BNPL payments, tax reports

tiers.name: Plus
tiers.headline_inclusions: 50 clients; adds proposals, retainers, receipt scanning, accountant access, double-entry accounting, bank reconciliation

tiers.name: Premium
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited clients; adds project profitability, bill receipt line-item capture, custom email templates

tiers.name: Select
tiers.headline_inclusions: All Premium + lower txn fees, capped ACH, Easy Switch migration, dedicated phone support, 2 free team seats, Advanced Payments included

pricing.notes: 30-day free trial on all plans; add-ons available on all tiers: Team Members $11/mo per user, Advanced Payments $20/mo (included in Select), FreshBooks Payroll $40/mo + $6/mo per user; yearly billing saves an additional 10%; promotional 70% off for first 4 months shown at time of scrape
